data.title: Farm Rich introduces 3 new frozen snacks for summer snacking with sweet, savory, and spicy flavors. #1 mozzarella stick brand.
data.description: Farm Rich, a renowned manufacturer of delectable frozen snacks, has introduced a new range of flavors varying from sweet to savory, and even spicy, to provide a convenient snacking option. Headquartered in St. Simons Island, Georgia, the company's latest offerings are poised to elevate the snacking experience. As of July 24, 2025, Farm Rich, which holds the top spot as America's leading mozzarella stick brand, has launched three distinctive and bold flavors to enhance the summer season.

data.title: AGCO Agriculture Foundation partners with CNFA to support young farmers and agri-food entrepreneurs.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Duluth, Georgia, the AGCO Agriculture Foundation shared news about its collaboration with Cultivating New Frontiers in Agriculture (CNFA). As a private foundation focused on combating hunger through sustainable agricultural practices, the Foundation aims to alleviate food insecurity. This partnership signifies a new chapter in their mission, potentially impacting numerous communities.

data.title: Real Estate Split Corp. (TSX: RS) announces July 2025 distribution to Class A shareholders.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Real Estate Split Corp. (TSX: RS) revealed that a distribution for July 2025 is set to be paid out to Class A shareholders. The forthcoming distribution details are as follows:

data.title: Black Duck study shows their solutions boost development productivity, decrease software risk and lower costs.
data.description: A recent study conducted by an independent research organization has revealed that Black Duck® Software, Inc.'s solutions have a substantial impact on development productivity and software risk management. The study found that Black Duck solutions are effective in reducing costs associated with application security. Black Duck, headquartered in Burlington, Mass., shared these findings on July 24, 2025. This underscores the company's position as a key player in the global market for application security.

data.title: Efficient Computer introduces Electron E1 Processor for energy-efficient computing, now available for developer use in Pittsburgh.
data.description: Efficient Computer, a leading company in developing highly energy-efficient general-purpose processors, has reached a significant milestone with the release of its first hardware product. Available for developer use, this marks a pivotal moment in Efficient's growth trajectory. The hardware release was made public on July 24, 2025, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation. This development signifies a major step forward in the technology sector as Efficient continues to make strides in producing cutting-edge solutions.

data.title: Robert C. O'Brien joins Strider Technologies' Strategic Advisory Board to support AI strategy and intelligence capabilities.
data.description: Former U.S. National Security Advisor Robert C. O'Brien is set to back Strider Technologies, Inc.'s AI strategy and enhance their strategic intelligence capabilities. The announcement was made in Salt Lake City on July 24, 2025. Strider, known for their top-notch strategic intelligence services, is aiming to bolster its AI initiatives under O'Brien's support. This collaboration is expected to significantly impact the company's expansion plans.

data.title: I-CAR launches a registered apprenticeship program for collision repair industry workforce development, on July 24, 2025.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Hoffman Estates, I-CAR, known as the Inter-Industry Conference on Auto Collision Repair, revealed the official introduction of its new initiatives. I-CAR is a pioneer in providing technical education programs, technical services, and talent solutions for the collision repair sector.

data.title: Palladyne AI demonstrates IQ software at KUKA Connexions conference on July 21-23, 2025 in Palm Beach, Florida.
data.description: Palladyne AI Corp. (NASDAQ: PDYN and PDYNW) recently attended the KUKA Connexions conference in Palm Beach, Florida from July 21-23, 2025. The event, hosted by KUKA Robotics, emphasized collaboration and brought together industry professionals to discuss advancements in artificial intelligence software for robotic platforms in defense and commercial sectors. KUKA Connexions serves as an annual summit for current and potential partners of KUKA Robotics to network and exchange ideas.

data.title: SEI expands SEI Access platform with 17 new fund managers, including BlackRock and Hamilton Lane.
data.description: SEI® has unveiled the expansion of its alternative investments platform, SEI Access™, by adding 17 fund managers. This move comes at a time when private markets are gaining momentum. The platform aims to offer a comprehensive investment experience. The announcement was made on July 24, 2025, by the company listed on NASDAQ as SEIC.

data.title: Genasys Inc. (NASDAQ: GNSS) schedules fiscal Q3 2025 results release after market close on August 14, 2025. Conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern / 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time.
data.description: A leading provider in Protective Communications, Genasys Inc. (NASDAQ: GNSS) disclosed intentions to unveil its financial performance for the fiscal third quarter concluding on June 30, 2025, post-market closing on Thursday, August 14, 2025. The company's conference call to review the fiscal third-quarter figures is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time / 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time on the same day. For the conference call on August 14, 2025, the following details were provided: Date: August 14, 2025; Time: 4:30 p.m. Eastern / 1:30 p.m. Pacific. Interested participants can join the call using the Toll-Free Dia feature.

data.title: Mortgage rates for 2025 and 2026 revised lower; forecasted at 6.4% and 6.0% respectively.
data.description: By the conclusion of 2025, mortgage rates are projected to reach 6.4 percent, with a subsequent decrease to 6.0 percent anticipated by the end of 2026. These figures represent a slight revision from the previous forecast, which predicted rates of 6.5 percent and 6.1 percent for these respective years. This data is derived from the July 2025 Economic and Housing Outlook report.

data.title: Edera ends 'Move Fast, Break Things' with security standard for AI, joins NVIDIA Inception, launched on AWS. #EderaSecurity
data.description: Edera has introduced a new security category as it joins the NVIDIA Inception Program and debuts on the AWS Marketplace. The company made the announcement on July 24, 2025, emphasizing the growing need for a prevention-first approach in AI agents and modern applications. This move comes as a response to the prevailing reliance on detection-heavy strategies, with Edera aiming to cater to this shift in demand.
